I fail the exam because every time I get information that the hose was not connected despite the pressure filling. I congratulate the author on having a low IQ when he tells us to open the luggage flap. Should we take a ladder for this?

As I think if you wonder what happened behind the scenes on the ground we’ll here you are this game is great as I like aviation and you can find aircraft like the 737 787 and I am looking forwards to see the new pushback feature come one day…⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

This is my first game in VR and it’s brilliant. Totally immersive. However, I’ve completed all of the training so far (pushback coming soon) and well is that it? Can’t see where to go from there. Are there any other modes? Career? Freedom mode? Not sure. Really hope so.
I swear if anybody hates this game, they’re just not a fan like this game is amazing, but I am waiting for the pushback car. I can just imagine what it would look like.

reviews.review_title: Love it! Can’t wait for the update!
reviews.review_description:
It’s a different take on the airline simulation aspect that I have never tried before. It’s quite nice to get some insight into what the ground crew is doing during arrival/departure at an airport.

The airplane is modelled nicely and what I could see then there are three different plane models available. It’s pretty nice just standing there and watching planes fly off, or to just inspect the plane in all its detail.

There’s some minor bugs/glitches here and there but nothing that disturbes the experience. The biggest one for me was on the last training when walking around the plane, where the quite small orange electric cable is preventing you to pass it. I had to do a small jump to be able to go over it, but that shouldn’t be necessary.

Overall, a great training app and simulator for something I have been curious about when flying somewhere. Thanks and please keep the updates coming!

Cheers!
An amazing game  but  I hope they can  let you do  flights coming in and out  from the gates  so you don’t have to  keep playing the scenarios  and just play infinitely.

Love this game because it’s like real life behind the scenes of airlines industry. These guys work so hard. When are you releasing the update for pushback?
This is a must buy!!!
Hoping to see more versions of it.
Supper to hard
AGHS is a great game, it’s realistic and very fun. I’ve just been waiting a long time for the pushback+sandbox update. Please release it soon.
when will the update come?
I mistaken this game for another game now I don’t know how to refund this game

I have been waiting a couple years for this game to be properly released but it just lacks content, I wish you have a free mode where you load bags or even all of the scenarios in one to make it really realistic as that would be cool. I feel like now it is a bit of a money grab but other them that I enjoy it. (Game has not been updated for a long time)

As an aviation enthusiast this game is amazing to me. It allows avgeeks like me to get up close to some amazing aircraft. Some things are not as I like but obviously I can't have everything to suit me. Some of the things I would change/add follow in order of how much I would like them in the game: 1) a wider variety of aircraft (I know that there are 100s of aircraft flying the sky but a few more would be nicer) 2) one thing I would change is the the aircraft marshalling, for me I find the fire left engine signal quite hard to achieve so I would give all signals a bit of wiggle room as humans who are not robots or real ground handlers will find it hard to do these signals. 3) different scenarios 4) a full run through from pre arrival checks to departure. But overall I think this game is amazing for avgeeks
I’ve work in aviation for years now and this app is the best thus far I can use to show someone some basic things that are done on the daily. Really want to see the push back module be available.

Even though I got this app while it was still in development, I think it is well beyond it’s time and it is very fun to engage with aviation. If you like aviation, this is a really good game for you. 💯￼

always wanted to know the feeling to be in front of a 737 ? with this game, you'll know !
a perfect approach of the ramp job. can't wait to see the next updates with tugs
I like it alot but there isnt alot of levels at the moment and i hope they add more in the future
